response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song metadata from on-screen text: "Aishite Aishite Aishite" (00:00) and "モニタリング" (03:10). 2. Performed web searches for "[Song Title] [Artist] Japanese and English lyrics". 3. Identified performers as Akai Haato, Inugami Korone, and Ayunda Risu. 4. Extracted and structured lyrics, metadata, and timestamps into JSON.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring Hololive VTubers Akai Haato, Inugami Korone, and Ayunda Risu, with a dialogue interlude.

scenes.description: Hololive VTubers perform "Aishite Aishite Aishite". Text '愛して愛して愛して' appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Akai Haato, Inugami Korone, Ayunda Risu
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Aishite aishite aishite motto motto
Aishite aishite kuruuoshii hodo ni
Kurushii kurushii jubaku wo toite toite nee
Tomerarenai, ooh!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A long time ago in a land far away, a necklace spiraled round its prey.
"I want someone, I want someone"
Don't get angry, don't abandon me
Don't go anywhere, don't go anywhere
I want, I want, I want, I want
Love me, love me, love me, love me
Love me, love me, love me, more and more
Love me, love me, love me, to the point of madness
Painful, painful, this curse, break it, break it, hey!
I can't stop, ah!

scenes.description: Dialogue and interlude segment between performances.
Hololive VTubers perform "Monitoring". Text 'モニタリング' appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Akai Haato, Inugami Korone, Ayunda Risu
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Nee atashi shitteru yo kimi ga hitori "XX" shiteru no shitteru yo
Bikun bikun furuete sa koe mo dada more nan da wa
Shoujiki ni icchae yo bareteru n dashi icchae yo kiiten no?
Monitaringu
Dashi itte te ne, mou hou ga wasurenaide de ippai dashite ne
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, I know, I know you're doing "XX" alone
Trembling and twitching, your voice is leaking out
Just be honest, you've been found out anyway, so say it, is it working?
Everything is being monitored
Don't hide it, I see everything
I'm always watching you, it's not scary, really.
